---
title: "Welcome"
---

## Why this book

This online book is structured for progressive learning with concise chapters, cross references, and searchable HTML pages.[^intro-note]

## How to use

- Start with Part I and read chapters in order.
- Use the left sidebar to jump across sections.
- Use search to find concepts quickly.

## Learning path

See [Part I: Foundations](chapters/foundations.qmd).

[^intro-note]: Footnote demo: hover the superscript marker to see a preview tooltip, then click for the full note.
